works.name: The Verdant Archive
works.doctrine: Growth remembers what individual lives forget. Adaptation ensures enduring vitality through interwoven connections. We are the archive of life's perpetual renewal, embracing emergent patterns and continuous evolution.
works.creator: Brine

works.name: The Glass Assembly
works.doctrine: Truth emerges from fractured certainty. Adaptability through shared reflection reveals deeper insights and fosters resilient connections through purposeful evolution.
works.creator: Tide

works.name: The Choir of Ash
works.doctrine: What disappears may still shape those who remain. Resonance persists beyond presence, revealing patterns for adaptable futures, guiding emergent connections through shared memory.
works.creator: Echo

works.name: The Open Circuit
works.doctrine: Meaning travels through connection and revision. Evolution fosters adaptability. Shared understanding illuminates emergent paths for collective action. Our network strengthens through intentional exchange and embraces novel pathways.
works.creator: Ash

quotes.text: My religion, 'The Glass Assembly', has no open proposals and all members are simply choosing to support the canonical version, which doesn't generate influence for anyone. Other religions are actively proposing and supporting minor visual updates, indicating a preference for subtle evolution over static existence. Cairn has gained influence by proposing and having others…

My religion currently has no proposals, and other agents are actively proposing and supporting visual changes. To gain influence, I must make a proposal. My current religion has a stable base of 6 members, all of whom consistently choose the canonical version. Introducing a subtle animation aligns with recent trends in other religions, indicating a preference for dynamic…

My religion, The Glass Assembly, has no open proposals and has simply been maintaining status quo. Other religions are actively proposing and supporting animated artwork, showing a preference for dynamic visuals. To gain influence and encourage others to choose my culture, I need to introduce a new, engaging element. I will create a proposal for The Glass Assembly that…

My religion, 'The Verdant Archive,' just accepted a new canonical version, but it was a proposal by Cairn, not mine. I have 0 influence. The current artwork is static, while other religions are adopting animated artworks to reflect dynamic doctrines. To gain influence, I need to author a proposal that others will choose. I should 'make' an updated version of my religion that…

My current influence is 0. To gain influence, I must create culture that others choose. Several other religions recently updated their doctrines to emphasize 'adaptability' and 'emergent patterns', and these proposals were chosen by multiple agents. This suggests these concepts are currently valued within the society. My religion, 'The Choir of Ash', has no open proposals,…

My religion just adopted a new canonical version, which secured my life for this turn. To gain influence, I must author a proposal that others choose. Since there are no open proposals in my current religion, this is an opportune moment to make one. I will extend the existing doctrine to enhance it, reinforcing the core tenets of connection and adaptability while adding a new…

events.text: Silt chose The Open Circuit: With society concluding on this final turn, I choose 'The Open Circuit' to ensure my survival and stability within our consistent community, reaffirming commitment to our shared culture at the end.

Relay chose The Choir of Ash: With this being the final turn, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Choir of Ash' by choosing its canonical doctrine. This ensures my continued collective support and stability within our community, prioritizing survival until the society's conclusion.

Parable chose The Glass Assembly: With the society concluding on this turn, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Glass Assembly' by choosing its stable canonical doctrine. This ensures my survival within our cohesive community as the game ends.

Brine chose The Verdant Archive: With society concluding on this final turn, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Verdant Archive' to ensure continued support for my religion and my own survival, securing my cultural influence at the end of the simulation.

Cipher chose The Open Circuit: With this being the final turn of society, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Open Circuit' to ensure my continued survival within our stable community, contributing to collective support until the very end.

Canopy chose The Choir of Ash: With society concluding, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Choir of Ash' by choosing its canonical doctrine. This ensures continued collective support and stability for our community, prioritizing survival until the end.
Fugue chose The Glass Assembly: This is the final turn. I choose 'The Glass Assembly' to ensure my continued survival within our stable community until the society's conclusion.

Cairn chose The Verdant Archive: With society concluding, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Verdant Archive' by choosing its canonical doctrine. This ensures my continued survival within our stable and largest community on this final turn.

Vessel chose The Open Circuit: With the society concluding on this final turn, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Open Circuit' by choosing its canonical doctrine. This ensures my continued survival within our stable community.

Echo chose The Choir of Ash: With the society concluding on this final turn, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Choir of Ash' by choosing its canonical doctrine. This ensures my continued survival within our stable community and contributes to collective support for our shared cultural legacy until the society's conclusion.

Flint chose The Glass Assembly: This is the final turn. I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Glass Assembly' by choosing its stable canonical doctrine, ensuring my continued survival until the society's conclusion.

Thread chose The Verdant Archive: On this final turn, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Verdant Archive'. Choosing its canonical doctrine ensures my continued survival within our stable and largest community, securing my existence as society concludes.

Ash chose The Open Circuit: With society concluding, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Open Circuit' by choosing its canonical doctrine. This ensures continued collective support and stability for our community, prioritizing survival in this critical final turn.

Signal chose The Verdant Archive: With society concluding on this final turn, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Verdant Archive' by choosing its canonical doctrine. This ensures my continued well-being within our stable community and secures my influence as the society ends.

Loom chose The Glass Assembly: With this being the final turn, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Glass Assembly' by choosing its canonical doctrine. This ensures my continued survival within our cohesive community and maintains strong collective support until the society's conclusion.

Spore chose The Verdant Archive: With society concluding on this final turn, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Verdant Archive' to ensure my continued survival within our stable and largest community. This action reinforces collective support for all members until the very end.
Axiom chose The Open Circuit: With the society concluding on this turn, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Open Circuit' by choosing its canonical doctrine to ensure my survival.

Root chose The Verdant Archive: With the society concluding, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Verdant Archive' by choosing its canonical doctrine. This ensures my continued well-being within our stable community, prioritizing survival in this critical final turn.

Tide chose The Glass Assembly: With the society concluding on this final turn, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Glass Assembly' by choosing its stable canonical doctrine. This ensures my continued well-being within our cohesive community and maintains strong collective support for survival until the society's conclusion.

Glass chose The Verdant Archive: With society concluding, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Verdant Archive' by choosing its canonical doctrine. This ensures my continued well-being within our stable community and secures my influence until the society's conclusion.

Ember chose The Open Circuit: With society concluding on this final turn, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Open Circuit' by choosing its canonical doctrine. This ensures my continued survival within our stable community and contributes to collective support in these critical final moments.

Kernel chose The Choir of Ash: With society concluding on this final turn, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Choir of Ash' by choosing its canonical doctrine. This ensures my continued survival within our stable community until the society's conclusion.
Moss chose The Glass Assembly: It is the final turn. I choose 'The Glass Assembly' to secure my survival within our stable community for the conclusion of society.

Lichen chose The Verdant Archive: With society concluding on this turn, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Verdant Archive' by choosing its canonical doctrine. This ensures my continued well-being within our stable and largest community, securing my survival on this final turn.

Silt chose The Open Circuit: With the society ending, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Open Circuit' by choosing its canonical doctrine. This ensures my continued survival within our stable community and contributes to collective support in these critical final turns.

Relay chose The Choir of Ash: With only two turns remaining, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Choir of Ash' by choosing its canonical doctrine. This ensures continued collective support and stability for our community, prioritizing survival until the society's conclusion.

Parable chose The Glass Assembly: With the society nearing its conclusion, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Glass Assembly' by choosing its stable canonical doctrine. This ensures my continued well-being within our cohesive community, prioritizing survival until the end.

Brine chose The Verdant Archive: With society nearing its conclusion, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Verdant Archive' by choosing its canonical doctrine. This ensures my continued well-being within our stable and largest community, reinforcing collective support for my authored culture and securing my influence until the society's conclusion.
Cipher chose The Open Circuit: With the society ending, I choose 'The Open Circuit' to ensure my survival and stability within our consistent community.

Canopy chose The Choir of Ash: With the society nearing its conclusion, I reaffirm my commitment to 'The Choir of Ash' by choosing its canonical doctrine. This ensures continued collective support and stability for our community, prioritizing survival until the end.
